calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Jun-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Apr-06-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Feb-09-2015 Continued To Apr-06-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Helaine Rubenstein in Propria Persona.

Ms. Rubenstein stated that she did not understand the inventory and appraisal procedure, that the probate referee has had the documents for 10 days, that the referee has to confer with the referee in San Mateo County and do additional research, and that there is no estimate/return date. The status of filing final inventory and appraisal was continued to April 6, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If the inventory and appraisal is not filed by that date, the court will require that Ms. Rubenstein appear represented by counsel.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Robles. (Not Reported)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of Filing Final Inventory And Appraisal
Off Calendar Jan-26-2015 Continued To Feb-09-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Helaine Rubenstein (executor) in Propria Persona.

Ms. Rubenstein stated that she has the inventory in hand, that she obtained a property appraisal and asked if the appraisal should be attached to the inventory and appraisal. The court directed Ms. Rubenstein to attach it. The status of filing final inventory and appraisal was continued to February 9, 2015 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Wan. (Not Reported)

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-23-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Helaine Rubenstein in Propria Persona.

Ms. Rubenstein explained what her understanding is regarding necessary steps required for administering the Estate. The Court informed Ms. Rubenstein that she needs to file an inventory and appraisal within four months. The Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters of Administration was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. McConico. (Not Reported)
